name: RPlog_Neo-Empire_Attacks_Kashyyyk
title: Neo-Empire Attacks Kashyyyk
summary: On the great Wroshyr-limb landing platforms of Rwookrrorro City, a quiet day on Kashyyyk is shattered when a Neo-Imperial force strikes the Wookiee homeworld. Jedi and allies, including Chewbacca, Jessalyn Valios, Joshua, Mailyn, and Wookiee defenders, scramble to meet the assault as ships and warriors converge on the besieged tree-world. The defenders fight to protect the planet and its people amid the chaos of the attack. The log captures a sprawling battle as Kashyyyk's defenders rally against the Neo-Empire's incursion.
